markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off strategy sprint for Otto's content marketing initiative ahead of GA launch.](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Otto is preparing for GA launch in mid-November, transitioning from limited beta to broader availability](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Target audience: frequent business travelers (6+ trips/year) managing own travel, especially at SMBs without corporate travel management](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to build authority in search/AI, educate on Otto's unique AI assistant approach](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Current lead generation via Instagram video ads (\~$10-15 cost per lead)](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

## Topics

### Otto Product Overview

  - [AI-powered executive assistant for booking/managing travel](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Learns user preferences through calendar integration, past bookings](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Focuses on business travelers, not leisure](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Handles common pain points (flight changes, upgrades, personalized recommendations)](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Target Audience & Positioning

  - ["Road warriors": 6+ business trips per year](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Primary segments:](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
    1.  SMB employees without corporate travel management
    2.  Dissatisfied users of existing corporate travel tools
  - [Positioning: "Executive assistant for every traveler"](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Not targeting: Leisure travelers, companies with strict travel policies](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

### Current Marketing & Growth

  - [Limited beta with hundreds of users](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Main acquisition: Instagram video ads (\~$10-15 cost per lead)](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Artificially constrained growth, pending fraud validation](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2927.0)
  - [Basic website with beta signup, expanding content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Build search/AI authority on business travel topics](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Educate on Otto's unique AI assistant approach](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Address common travel pain points, questions](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Highlight benefits vs. leisure travel sites, outdated corporate tools](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Technical & Security Considerations

  - [Uses VGS for secure payment/personal data storage](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)
  - [Multiple authentication options (Google, Apple, Microsoft, email)](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
  - [No reported user concerns about security/privacy](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)

### GrowthX Engagement

  - [8-week strategy sprint to accelerate content development](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
  - [Will provide access to analytics, CMS, brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Flexible on content structure, page hierarchy based on Otto's needs](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)
  - [Primary focus on written content, open to exploring other formats](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=3281.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Otto to provide access to analytics, CMS, brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [GrowthX to ingest product info, user data, create strategy artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Schedule deep-dive product demo (Otto creating product videos in 2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2976.0)
  - [Otto to send GrowthX team beta access for hands-on experience](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Ongoing communication via Slack for content reviews, strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/iPVsU_yRUVkt6NdKPKyG4KXxW5sTcn_5?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
